dragons.name: Drogon
dragons.description: The largest and most aggressive of Daenerys's dragons. Drogon becomes her primary mount and plays a key role in the conquest of Westeros.

dragons.name: Rhaegal
dragons.description: A green-scaled dragon with bronze wings. Rhaegal is calmer than Drogon and forms a bond with Jon Snow.

dragons.name: Viserion
dragons.description: Cream and gold colored dragon. After being killed by the Night King he is resurrected as an undead ice dragon.

dragons.name: Vhagar
dragons.description: One of the three dragons used during Aegon's conquest. Vhagar becomes one of the largest and most powerful dragons in history.

dragons.name: Caraxes
dragons.description: A lean red dragon known for its aggressive nature and distinctive appearance. Caraxes is one of the fiercest dragons in battle.

dragons.name: Syrax
dragons.description: A golden she-dragon bonded to Princess Rhaenyra. Syrax symbolizes royal power and Targaryen legitimacy.

dragons.name: Meleys
dragons.description: A swift red dragon famous for her speed. Meleys is one of the fastest dragons during the Dance of the Dragons.

dragons.name: Balerion
dragons.description: The greatest dragon in Westeros history. Balerion helped conquer the Seven Kingdoms and forged the Iron Throne.
